titleStmt.title: SII 29.27: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 27. (A.R. No. B. 116 of 1961-62.) BŌDHAN, BODHAN TALUK, NIZAMABAD DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar lying in the Inspection Bungalow.

It records that while Chālukya Trailōkyamalladēva was ruling over the empire, perggaḍe Jōgapayya got reconstructed the temple of god Indra-Nārāyaṇa, consecrated the image of Vishṇu therein and erected a Garuḍa pillar also. Further, it states that the perggaḍe made several grants such as two villages-Piriya Māvuḍige and Kiriya Māvuḍige situated in Pūseya-70, house-sites, oil-mills, a flower garden and income from the toll on salt for the worship of the god and maintenance of the temple. The grants were made free of all imposts. The temple, it is stated, was formerly constructed in the capital Bōdhana by the emperor Indra vallabha of the Rāshṭrakūṭa family. The record was written by Girivajra Nāgadēva.
It is dated Śaka 978, Durmukhi, Jyēshṭha, śu. 13 Thursday corresponding to 1056 A.D., May 29, Wednesday (not Thursday).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta bhuvanā
śraya śrīpṛthvīvalla
bha mahārājādhi
rāja paramēśvara pa
rama bhaṭṭāraka satyā
śraya kuḷatiḷakaṁ
cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī
mattraiḷōkyamalladēva
ra vijayarājyamutta
rōttarābhivriddhi prava
rddhamānamācaṁdrārkka
tāraṁ salutta mire
sakavarṣa 978 neya
durmukhi saṁvatsarada
jēṣṭa suddha 13 bṛha
spativāradaṁdu rāṣṭra
kūṭānvaya cakrēśvara ni
ndravallabhaṁ rājadhāni
bhodhanadoḷu māḍisi
dindra nārāyaṇadē
vara dēvāyatanaṁ
la kramadiṁ jīrṇnamāgi
ḻbudaṁ kaṇḍu śrī madāha
vamalladēva pādapadmō
pa jīviyappa perggaḍe
jōgapayyaṁ tadīya
dēvagṛha dōddharaṇamuṁ
viṣṇudēvaṁ garuḍma(mana)

staṁbha pratiṣṭheyumaṁ mā
ḍiyalli pūrvada taḷavṛ
tti gīta vādya nṛrtta kanda
sarvabādhā parihāra
māgi biṭṭa kāddindra nā
rāyaṇa gariyā doṁba
ttu kaiyagalada nivēśa
na naḻvattā dēguladi pa
va dēvara brahmapuri
gēriyāḷeḻkayyagala
da mūvattu kayniḷada
nivēśana maṟuvatta
ydā lekkada sūtrada
(ti)gaḷa maniyēḻanu
nivēśana vaḻpattara du
daguladiṁ baḍaga dēva
śālagada sūḷagēri
yalli pūṇavaradupaḍika
vaḷḷadiṁ mūḍa pūdō
ṭa mattameraḍu Uppi
na peṟeṁgaṁ suṁkada
varāpuṁmānavondu
khaṇḍasphuṭita jīrnnōdara
ṇa gandadupaḍipanivadu
kendu sarvvanamasyavā
gi dipya siyavaḻpatta (ddā)
baḻiya piriya māmu
ḍigeyindu kiṟiya mā
vuḍiyandanu bāḍava(reṁ)
du naiṣṭhika snānadidammaṁ
kāvaṇanu mupadrava
māḍidaṁge vāraṇāsi

svasthānadoḷā jōgayya
(spa)ji keṇno ba(va) daṁtanā (śrī)
ga niḷayaṁ nāgēndrana
tta vārijamabā
radaṁte darmmadayu
ta mududyādana (ntāsa)te
trijagaṁ doniga (ḷaṇa)
pudi śrī jōga
(yya)gadiṁ viji(tō)
pudaṇada naṁga tā
byaṁtvādanaṁ bodanaṁ
A lli pūrvvameyyaṁ
yājñālaṁ punakada
ṇnaṁ kariya dra
mayvattiradu (biṭida)
gādramapannara pu(su)
riga giḻtaṁgādramma sā
sita miḻedaṁgadramatā
battāḻiṁtimayyaṁda(ya)
tapuda pratipāḷisuvara
bīruda lēkhaka girivajra
nāgadēvana likhite ma(ṁ)
ṁgaḷa mahā śrī .
Digital edition of SII 29.27 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
